targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', applied_at) AS INTEGER) AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications a2 WHERE a2.applied_at <= a.applied_at) AS value FROM applications a ORDER BY applied_at
SELECT strftime('%Y-W%W', applied_at) AS Week, COUNT(*) AS Applications FROM applications GROUP BY Week ORDER BY Week

panels.title: Response Time per Company (days from applied to next status)

targets.queryText: SELECT a.company AS Company, CAST((julianday(MIN(e2.occurred_at)) - julianday(a.applied_at)) AS INTEGER) AS Days FROM applications a JOIN status_events e2 ON e2.application_id = a.id AND e2.status != 'applied' GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY Days
